mapper.sql: series_id , user_id, series_title, about_text, is_delete, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_series (user_id, series_title, about_text, is_delete, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{series_title}, #{about_text}, 0, #{update_time}, #{update_user}, #{create_time}, #{create_user})
mapper.select: SELECT series_id, user_id, series_title, about_text, update_time, update_user, create_time, create_user FROM tb_series WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
